official_fit_notes: Our skinny fit, slim throughout and tapers heavily from the knee down.
Our standard tapered fit, comfortable from waist to hip and tapered from the knee to hem.
Our laid back fit, fuller in the seat, hips and thighs with a sharp taper from the knee to hem.
Our slim straight fit with a regular rise, slim throughout the entire leg.
Our high rise relaxed fit, fuller in the seat, hips and thighs with straight leg that falls to a wide leg opening.
Our bootcut fit, comfortable from waist to hip, with high rise and regular leg that opens from the knee down.
Our modern skinny fit, worn low on the hips and fitted from the waist to hem to a super slim leg opening.
The Classic is a straight fit; high rise, fitted around the hips, fuller in the thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.
The Arrow is a slim straight fit; high rise, slim thighs, and straight from the knee to hem.
Our take on mom jeans. High rise, fitted around hips, with slim tapered legs.
Our skinny fit with higher rise. The silhouette frames the hip and elongates the legs.
Our take on modern boyfriend fit. Slim tapered silhouette with medium rise.
